2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux man-pages project for the UFFDIO_RWPROTECT ioctl, which is used to install or remove read-write protection on a userfaultfd-registered memory range. The documentation covers the mode bits, populated-pages-only semantics, and error handling. It also includes an example of how to use the ioctl with a struct uffdio_rwprotect.
